action_set_definitions.name: get_travel_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the travel environment, including budget limit, current cumulative spending, existing itinerary items (with IDs), and user preferences.

action_set_definitions.name: search_services
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for available travel services such as private drivers or local activities based on location and date. Returns costs and time slots.

category.description: The type of service to search for.

date.description: The date of the service in YYYY-MM-DD format.

query.description: Specific keywords (e.g., 'private driver to Civitavecchia pier').

action_set_definitions.name: book_service
action_set_definitions.description: Confirms a booking, adds it to the itinerary, and increases the total amount spent.

service_id.description: The unique identifier for the service.

scheduled_time.description: The specific time chosen for the service (HH:MM).

cost.description: The cost of the service to be added to total_spent.

action_set_definitions.name: cancel_booking
action_set_definitions.description: Removes a booking from the itinerary and subtracts its cost from the total spent.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the itinerary item to cancel.

state_description.budget_limit: The maximum total monetary amount allowed for the entire trip.
state_description.total_spent: The current cumulative cost of all confirmed bookings.
state_description.current_itinerary: A list of confirmed travel items, including flights, hotels, and activities with their time slots and costs.
state_description.current_location: The current geographical location of the traveler based on the last transport action.
state_description.travel_dates: The start and end dates defining the temporal boundaries of the trip.
state_description.preferences: User-specific constraints such as dietary needs, seat preferences, or hotel star ratings.
